name: oie-web-administrator
description: Web-based administrator for Open Integration Engine (Mirth Connect fork). Standalone NodeJS app that mirrors the Swing Administrator and is pluggable by extension developers.

scripts.build: vite build && node tools/build-plugins.mjs && node tools/build-connectors.mjs
scripts.test: for f in client/core/*.test.js server/*.test.js; do node "$f" || exit 1; done
